post.summary:
Books event seats based on the specified booking request and returns the keys of the successfully booked
seats.
post.description:
This method performs an asynchronous operation to book seats for an event. If the
            booking request is invalid or if the booking process fails due to service issues, an appropriate error
            response is returned.

requestBody.description:
The booking request containing details of the event seats to be booked. This parameter must not be null and
            should include valid seat identifiers.

post.summary:
Books season seats based on the specified booking request and returns the keys of the successfully booked
seats.
post.description:
This method performs an asynchronous operation to book seats for a season. If the
            booking request is invalid or if the booking process fails due to service issues, an appropriate error
            response is returned.

requestBody.description:
The booking request containing details of the season seats to be booked. This parameter must not be null and
            should include valid seat identifiers.

post.summary: Releases the specified seats for an event or season, making them available for booking.

requestBody.description:
The request containing the event or season key and the list of seat identifiers to release. The key cannot
            be null or empty, and the list of seats must contain at least one item.

parameters.name: chartKey
parameters.description: The unique Id for the chart.

get.summary: Retrieves a list of seats.io charts asynchronously

post.summary: Asynchronously holds the specified seats for an event and returns a token representing the hold.
post.description:
This method reserves the requested seats for a limited time, allowing further actions
            such as purchase or release. If the event is not found or the seat information is invalid, the operation may
            fail. Exception handling should be implemented to manage such cases appropriately.

requestBody.description:
The request containing the event identifier and the collection of seat identifiers to be held. The event
            identifier must correspond to an existing event, and the seat identifiers must be valid for that event.

get.summary: Retrieves the hold token associated with the specified token string.
get.description:
This method is asynchronous and may involve network calls to retrieve the hold token.
            Ensure that the hold token is valid before calling this method.

parameters.name: holdToken
parameters.description: The hold token string used to identify the specific hold request. This parameter cannot be null or empty.

delete.summary: Releases the hold on seats associated with the specified hold token.
delete.description:
This method is asynchronous and should be awaited. It communicates with the seat
            management service to release the hold, and may throw exceptions if the hold token is invalid or if service
            errors occur.

parameters.name: holdToken
parameters.description: The token that identifies the hold to be released. This value must be a valid, non-null hold token.

get.summary: Retrieves the current status, forSale flag, and extraData for the specified seats.

parameters.name: seatKeys
parameters.description: One or more seat object labels to query.

put.summary: Sets the for-sale configuration for the specified seats in a Seats.io event.

requestBody.description: The event key, seat keys, and whether the seats should be marked as for sale or not for sale.

put.summary:
Updates the extra data (reason, color) for the specified seats in a Seats.io event.
Send an empty object to clear extra data.

requestBody.description: The event key, seat keys, and extra data to set on each seat.

post.summary: Releases the specified seats, resetting their status to free.

requestBody.description: The event key and seat labels to release.

get.summary: Retrieves the hold token details for the specified token string.

parameters.name: holdToken
parameters.description: The hold token string to look up.

delete.summary: Expires the specified hold token, releasing all seats held by it.

post.summary: Holds the specified seats by creating a temporary hold token.

requestBody.description: The event key and seat labels to hold.

post.summary: Books the specified seats, optionally consuming a hold token.

requestBody.description: The event key, seats with prices, hold token, and booking details.

get.summary: Lists status changes for a Seats.io event, with cursor-based pagination.
Lists status change history for a specific object within a Seats.io event.
Retrieves a summary report of seat availability, grouped by section.
Retrieves a summary report of seat availability, grouped by zone.
Retrieves a summary report of seat availability, grouped by availability (available vs not_available).

Retrieves a summary report of seat availability, grouped by availability reason
(available, booked, reservedByToken, not_for_sale, and any custom statuses).

post.summary: Calculates dynamic ticket prices for the specified event using the provided rules engine service.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the event for which to calculate dynamic prices.
